_doc: Nested sub-repos to materialize into a worktree. These are gitignored, own-remote repos developed in place that `.worktreeinclude` CANNOT copy (it copies gitignored files, and git does not recurse a nested-repo boundary — verified 2026-06-20, prediction 55b1735b). hooks/materialize_worktree_repos.py reads this on SessionStart + PostToolUse[EnterWorktree] and clones any missing entry into the worktree (from the local primary checkout if present, else `remote`). To register a new sub-repo: append one {path, remote} entry — no code change. See skills/nested-repos.
